mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRESET_TABLE (preset_id, schema_name, table_name, where_condition, order_num) VALUES (#{presetId}, #{schemaName}, #{tableName}, #{whereCondition}, #{orderNum})

INSERT INTO PRESET_TABLE (preset_id, schema_name, table_name, where_condition, order_num) VALUES
(#{t.presetId}, #{t.schemaName}, #{t.tableName}, #{t.whereCondition}, #{t.orderNum})
